summary: TWO_COLUMN: top axes with static BLUE 𝒩(0, 0.49) + ORANGE sliding 𝒩(τ, 1.0) + GREEN overlap curve, driven by ValueTracker τ_tr from -3 to +3. Bottom axes shows GREY reference + GREEN growing trail + RED rider of (f*g)(τ) = 𝒩(0, σ² = σ₁²+σ₂²). Live panel has σ₁, σ₂, τ, convolution value, σ_out.
